clusterRules.rule: Every Teoyube word may belong to more than one cluster.
clusterRules.example: Luma belongs to Light & Revelation, Calling & Purpose, and Presence & Glory.

clusterRules.rule: Every cluster must contain at least 4 prayer-ready words.
clusterRules.example: Protection sequence: Nethar → Shalem → Koriel → Kethor.

clusterRules.rule: Every cluster must have one anchor scripture.
Every cluster must generate a declaration.
clusterRules.example: God heals, renews, restores, and strengthens me.
